app.disclaimerTextCostEstimate: The pricing and tax information provided in this quotation are for reference purposes only. Final amounts, including applicable taxes, will be based on the actual invoice issued at the time of settlement.
app.disclaimerTextDeliveryNote: The pricing and tax information provided in this delivery note are for reference purposes only. Final amounts, including applicable taxes, will be based on the actual invoice issued at the time of settlement.
app.referInvoice: For official and payment details, please refer to the final invoice.
app.contactPrefix: For any queries, contact us at
app.computerGenerated: This is a computer-generated document. No signature is required.
app.orderTerm1: Full amount to be paid in cash before obtaining delivery of the power tool.
app.orderTerm2: While we endeavor to deliver the power tool as per the schedule date, we may postpone the delivery date due to circumstances beyond our control.
app.orderTerm3: By signing this document, user is accepting terms and conditions mentioned above.
app.zaIndemnityBody: The use of Non genuine Bosch power tool spare parts can lead to serious injury and premature tool failure. The use of non-genuine Bosch parts or modifications (including any non-original Bosch fitted electric plugs) may void all warranty conditions. Bosch recommends all non-Bosch genuine spare parts be replaced with genuine spare parts to the original manufacture standard to ensure proper working of the Bosch power tool. No repairs shall be carried out by Bosch on tools with damaged or modified cables and plugs if a replacement Bosch cable option is rejected. Repairs will not be done on non-Bosch spare parts or part thereof or modified Bosch power tools. Robert Bosch and its subsidiaries accepts no liability for repairs, injuries, or tool failure where non genuine Bosch spare parts are used.
app.zaIndemnityConsentAccept: I accept the replacement of the cable and the replacement of non-original spare parts as stated.
app.zaIndemnityConsentRefuse: Refuse to replace the cable and non-original spare parts.
app.zaDataProtectionBody: The protection of your privacy throughout the course of processing personal data as well as the security of all business data are important concerns to us. Robert Bosch (Pty) Ltd is the controller responsible for the processing of your data and only in accordance with statutory regulations. To be sure that our performances match up with your expectations we collect, process and use personal data only when there is either a statutory legal basis to do so or if you have given your consent to the processing or use of personal data concerning this matter, e.g. by means of registration or starting a repair process. Through this form, Robert Bosch (Pty) Ltd collects your personal data for Customer Management. You can contact Robert Bosch (Pty) Ltd after-sales service, 96 15th Road, Randjespark, Midrand, Gauteng, Republic of South Africa to exercise your rights of access, rectification and opposition in accordance with the required and applicable statutory regulations of the local Law.
app.zaDataProtectionConsentIntro: I agree that my personal data can be collected by Robert Bosch (Pty) Ltd.
app.zaDataProtectionConsentYes: Yes (recommended/needed to conduct your repair process)
app.zaCancellationBody: You may revoke the foregoing consent and request deletion of your information at any time by sending an informal message Robert Bosch (Pty) Ltd after-sales service, 96 15th Road, Randjespark, Midrand, Gauteng, Republic of South Africa or by e-mail for the future to: africa.dpo@za.bosch.com
app.trOrderReceiptClause1: For chargeable repairs, the full amount must be paid in cash by the customer before the power tool is delivered.
app.trOrderReceiptClause2: Although we strive to deliver the power tool by the programmed date, we may postpone the delivery date due to circumstances beyond our control.
app.trOrderReceiptClause3: The estimated cost may vary depending on additional spare part(s) required to perform the repair.
app.trOrderReceiptClause4: After the estimated cost is approved by the customer and our repair is authorized, the power tool must be collected by the customer within one week.
app.trOrderReceiptClause5: Malfunctions resulting from normal wear and tear, excessive force, misuse, incorrect application, repairs by unauthorized service providers, and the use of incorrect/worn accessories are not covered by the warranty.
app.trOrderReceiptClause6: The tool will be delivered upon the return of the delivery form copy.
app.trOrderReceiptClause7: The information listed on the invoice will also be shared and used by Bosch.
app.trOrderReceiptClause8: You are receiving this E-mail / SMS because you are a registered subscriber of Bosch Power Tools Service.
app.trOrderReceiptClause9: By signing this document, the user is deemed to have accepted the terms and conditions stated above.
app.trOrderReceiptClause10: If the malfunction of a product covered under warranty cannot be rectified within ten business days, a similar product will be provided to the consumer until the original tool's repair is completed.
app.trCostEstimateDisclaimerPara1: The pricing and tax information provided in this quotation are for reference purposes only. Final amounts, including applicable taxes will be based on the actual invoice issued at the time of settlement.
app.trCostEstimateDisclaimerPara2: The calculations provided are only estimates. If, following inspection of the product and the repair process, it is determined that additional costs are required, the customer will be informed and their approval will be obtained.
app.trDeliveryNoteClause1: The warranty period starts from the tool's delivery date and is 2 years. For commercial/professional use, the warranty period is 1 year.
app.trDeliveryNoteClause2: All parts of the tool, including its entirety, are within our company's warranty scope (excluding wear and tear parts such as battery, felt, oil, and belt).
app.trDeliveryNoteClause3: The warranty period for a replaced tool during a warranty application is limited to the remaining warranty period of the purchased good.
app.trDeliveryNoteClause4: The maximum repair duration for the tool is 20 business days. If the tool's defect cannot be remedied within 10 business days, the manufacturer, producer, or importer must allocate a similar tool to the consumer for use until the repair of the original tool is completed.
app.trDeliveryNoteClause5Intro: In cases where the consumer exercises their right to free repair, and the tool:
app.trDeliveryNoteClause5OptionA: malfunctions again within the warranty period,
app.trDeliveryNoteClause5OptionB: exceeds the maximum duration necessary for repair,
app.trDeliveryNoteClause5OptionC: is determined by an authorized service center, seller, manufacturer, or importer through a report to be beyond repair,
app.trDeliveryNoteClause5Outro: in such situations, the consumer can demand from the seller a refund of the tool price, a price reduction proportional to the defect, or, if possible, the replacement of the tool with a defect-free equivalent. The seller cannot reject the consumer's demand. If this demand is not fulfilled, the seller, manufacturer, and importer are jointly and severally responsible.
app.trDeliveryNoteClause6: Malfunctions arising from using the tool contrary to the instructions in its user manual are outside the warranty scope.
app.trDeliveryNoteClause7: To ensure energy saving, do not operate your tool idly.
app.trDeliveryNoteClause8: During its lifespan, the tool's maintenance and repair duration at authorized service stations cannot exceed the maximum repair duration. This duration starts on the date of notification of the tool-related defect to the authorized service station or seller within the warranty period, and on the date of delivery of the tool to the authorized service station if outside the warranty period. The consumer can make a defect notification via phone, e-mail, registered mail with return receipt, and similar means. In case of dispute, the burden of proof for the notification belongs to the consumer. If a phone line is allocated by the manufacturer or importer for consumers to communicate regarding after-sales services, the manufacturer or importer cannot choose a tariff higher than the ordinary tariff for this line.
app.trDeliveryNoteClause9: The date of the tool repair's completion is notified to the consumer via phone, short message, e-mail, registered mail with return receipt, and similar means. In case of dispute, the burden of proof for the notification belongs to the authorized service station.
app.trDeliveryNoteClause10: Outside the tool's warranty period, regarding installation, maintenance, and repair service given by service stations, no fee can be demanded from the consumer under any name if the same defect repeats within one year. Malfunctions arising from the consumer's use of the tool contrary to the instructions in its user manual are outside the scope of this article.
app.trDeliveryNoteClause11: Outside the tool's warranty period, if a part not mandatory to be sold with a warranty certificate is changed or sold by the service center, a warranty period of not less than six months is given for the changed or sold part.
